member.name: T:Calculadora.App
member.summary: Application entry point. Initialises the theme system and launches the main window.
App

member.name: M:Calculadora.App.OnStartup(System.Windows.StartupEventArgs)
member.summary: Called by the WPF framework before the first window is shown. Applies the default dark theme and creates .

member.name: M:Calculadora.App.InitializeComponent
member.summary: InitializeComponent

member.name: M:Calculadora.App.Main
member.summary: Application Entry Point.

member.name: T:Calculadora.Common.RelayCommand
member.summary: Parameterless implementation backed by delegates.

member.name: M:Calculadora.Common.RelayCommand.#ctor(System.Action,System.Func{System.Boolean})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of .
member.param: The action to invoke when the command executes.

member.name: E:Calculadora.Common.RelayCommand.CanExecuteChanged
member.summary: Hooks into the WPF command manager so the UI re-queries command availability on every user interaction.

member.name: T:Calculadora.Common.RelayCommand`1
member.summary: Generic implementation that accepts a strongly-typed parameter.
member.typeparam: The type of the command parameter.

member.name: M:Calculadora.Common.RelayCommand`1.#ctor(System.Action{`0},System.Func{`0,System.Boolean})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of .
member.param: The action to invoke when the command executes.

member.name: T:Calculadora.Common.ViewModelBase
member.summary: Base class for all MVVM ViewModels. Centralises boilerplate so derived classes only need to call from their property setters.

member.name: M:Calculadora.Common.ViewModelBase.OnPropertyChanged(System.String)
member.summary: Raises for the specified property. automatically infers the property name when called from inside a property setter.
member.param: Name of the property that changed.

member.name: M:Calculadora.Common.ViewModelBase.SetProperty``1(``0@,``0,System.String)
member.summary: Assigns to and raises only when the value actually changes.
member.param: Inferred automatically from the call site.
member.returns: true if the value changed; false otherwise.

member.name: T:Calculadora.MainWindow
member.summary: Code-behind for MainWindow.xaml. Translates raw keyboard input into calculator commands when the standard calculator view is active.
MainWindow

member.name: M:Calculadora.MainWindow.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes the component.

member.name: M:Calculadora.MainWindow.OnPreviewKeyDown(System.Object,System.Windows.Input.KeyEventArgs)
member.summary: Intercepts key-down events from the focused ContentControl and forwards them to commands. Key events are suppressed (e.Handled = true) to prevent duplicate input.

member.name: M:Calculadora.MainWindow.InitializeComponent
member.summary: InitializeComponent

member.name: T:Calculadora.Models.CalculatorModel
member.summary: Stateless arithmetic engine, fully decoupled from WPF and MVVM infrastructure.

member.name: M:Calculadora.Models.CalculatorModel.Calculate(System.Double,System.Double,System.String)
member.summary: Performs the arithmetic operation identified by on the two operands.
member.returns: The computed result, or for invalid operations (e.g. division by zero). Unknown operators return unchanged.

member.name: T:Calculadora.Models.ExpressionItem
member.summary: Represents a single mathematical expression entry in the graphing calculator UI.
member.remarks: Implements directly (rather than inheriting ViewModelBase) so it can be data-bound inside an ItemsControl without pulling in the full ViewModel hierarchy.

member.name: P:Calculadora.Models.ExpressionItem.Id
member.summary: Unique identifier used to map this entry to its curve on the ScottPlot canvas.

member.name: P:Calculadora.Models.ExpressionItem.Text
member.summary: The mathematical function text entered by the user, e.g. "x^2 + sin(x)".

member.name: P:Calculadora.Models.ExpressionItem.Color
member.summary: Hexadecimal color string ("#RRGGBB") used to render the plotted curve.

member.name: P:Calculadora.Models.ExpressionItem.Visible
member.summary: Controls whether the curve is rendered on the plot.

member.name: M:Calculadora.Models.ExpressionItem.OnPropertyChanged(System.String)
member.summary: Raises for the calling member.
member.param: Inferred automatically from the call site.

member.name: T:Calculadora.Models.ThemeManager
member.summary: Application-wide theme controller. Applies the selected WPF UI theme and merges the corresponding colour sub-dictionary from Themes/Colors.xaml into the application resource tree.

member.name: P:Calculadora.Models.ThemeManager.IsDark
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the dark theme is currently active.

member.name: E:Calculadora.Models.ThemeManager.ThemeChanged
member.summary: Raised after each successful theme switch.

member.name: M:Calculadora.Models.ThemeManager.Initialize(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes the theme system and applies the startup theme.
member.param: true (default) to start in dark mode; false for light mode.

member.name: M:Calculadora.Models.ThemeManager.Toggle
member.summary: Toggles between dark and light themes.

member.name: M:Calculadora.Models.ThemeManager.Apply(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Applies the specified theme immediately.
member.param: true to apply dark theme; false for light.

member.name: M:Calculadora.Models.ThemeManager.MergeColorSubDictionary(System.String)
member.summary: Locates the Colors.xaml dictionary (loading it if absent), then copies all entries from the requested colour sub-dictionary into the application root resources, removing any entries belonging to the opposite theme first.
member.param: Resource key of the sub-dictionary to activate ("Dark" or "Light").

member.name: M:Calculadora.Models.ThemeManager.FindColorsDictionary
member.summary: Searches the merged dictionaries for the Colors.xaml resource dictionary.
member.returns: The dictionary if found; otherwise null.

member.name: T:Calculadora.Models.ThemeToggleButton
member.summary: Code-behind for the theme toggle button user control. Synchronises the toggle state with and animates the moon/sun icon swap defined in ThemeToggleButton.xaml.
ThemeToggleButton

member.name: F:Calculadora.Models.ThemeToggleButton._syncing
member.summary: Guards against recursive state updates when the toggle is programmatically checked.

member.name: M:Calculadora.Models.ThemeToggleButton.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes the control, aligns its initial checked state with the current theme, and subscribes to .

member.name: M:Calculadora.Models.ThemeToggleButton.Btn_Checked(System.Object,System.Windows.RoutedEventArgs)
member.summary: Handles the toggle button Checked event. IsChecked == true means the user wants the light theme (sun icon).

member.name: M:Calculadora.Models.ThemeToggleButton.Btn_Unchecked(System.Object,System.Windows.RoutedEventArgs)
member.summary: Handles the toggle button Unchecked event. IsChecked == false means the user wants the dark theme (moon icon).

member.name: M:Calculadora.Models.ThemeToggleButton.OnThemeChanged(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Responds to external theme changes by updating the toggle state without triggering another call.

member.name: M:Calculadora.Models.ThemeToggleButton.InitializeComponent
member.summary: InitializeComponent

member.name: T:Calculadora.ViewModels.NormalCalcViewModel
member.summary: ViewModel for the standard (non-graphing) calculator view. Implements a precedence-aware infix evaluator using two token lists: one for live computation and one for the full expression history shown on the display.

member.name: F:Calculadora.ViewModels.NormalCalcViewModel._tokens
member.summary: Working tokens used for computation; intermediate results are collapsed here.

member.name: F:Calculadora.ViewModels.NormalCalcViewModel._expressionTokens
member.summary: Full expression history tokens; never collapsed, used only for the expression label.

member.name: P:Calculadora.ViewModels.NormalCalcViewModel.Display
member.summary: Gets the main numeric display string.

member.name: P:Calculadora.ViewModels.NormalCalcViewModel.Expression
member.summary: Gets the expression history string shown above the main display.

member.name: P:Calculadora.ViewModels.NormalCalcViewModel.DigitCommand
member.summary: Appends a digit character to the current operand.

member.name: P:Calculadora.ViewModels.NormalCalcViewModel.OperatorCommand
member.summary: Pushes the current display value and the selected operator onto the token stack.

member.name: P:Calculadora.ViewModels.NormalCalcViewModel.EqualsCommand
member.summary: Evaluates the full expression and shows the result.

member.name: P:Calculadora.ViewModels.NormalCalcViewModel.ClearCommand
member.summary: Resets the calculator to its initial state.

member.name: P:Calculadora.ViewModels.NormalCalcViewModel.DecimalCommand
member.summary: Appends a decimal separator to the current operand.

member.name: P:Calculadora.ViewModels.NormalCalcViewModel.ToggleSignCommand
member.summary: Negates the current operand.

member.name: P:Calculadora.ViewModels.NormalCalcViewModel.PercentCommand
member.summary: Divides the current operand by 100.

member.name: M:Calculadora.ViewModels.NormalCalcViewModel.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes all commands.

member.name: M:Calculadora.ViewModels.NormalCalcViewModel.OnDigit(System.String)
member.summary: Appends to the display, or starts a fresh entry if the previous action was =.

member.name: M:Calculadora.ViewModels.NormalCalcViewModel.OnOperator(System.String)
member.summary: Pushes the current display value and onto the token stacks, collapsing any pending higher-precedence operations first.

member.name: M:Calculadora.ViewModels.NormalCalcViewModel.OnEquals
member.summary: Finalises the expression, evaluates all remaining operators, and shows the result. Sets so the next digit starts a fresh calculation.

member.name: M:Calculadora.ViewModels.NormalCalcViewModel.OnClear
member.summary: Resets the calculator to its default initial state.

member.name: M:Calculadora.ViewModels.NormalCalcViewModel.OnDecimal
member.summary: Appends a decimal separator to the current operand, or starts a new "0." entry if waiting for the next operand.

member.name: M:Calculadora.ViewModels.NormalCalcViewModel.OnToggleSign
member.summary: Flips the sign of the current display value.

member.name: M:Calculadora.ViewModels.NormalCalcViewModel.OnPercent
member.summary: Divides the current display value by 100.

member.name: M:Calculadora.ViewModels.NormalCalcViewModel.CollapseTokens(System.Int32)
member.summary: Reduces the list by evaluating all pending operators whose precedence is greater than or equal to . is intentionally left untouched.
member.returns: true on success; false if a parse or arithmetic error occurs.

member.name: M:Calculadora.ViewModels.NormalCalcViewModel.GetPrecedence(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the arithmetic precedence level for the given operator.
member.returns: 2 for * and /; 1 for + and -; 0 for unknown.

member.name: M:Calculadora.ViewModels.NormalCalcViewModel.BuildDisplayExpression
member.summary: Builds the human-readable expression string from , replacing internal operator symbols with their display counterparts.

member.name: M:Calculadora.ViewModels.NormalCalcViewModel.ClearTokens
member.summary: Clears both token lists atomically.

member.name: M:Calculadora.ViewModels.NormalCalcViewModel.TriggerError
member.summary: Transitions the calculator into an error state, clearing all pending tokens. The user must press C to recover.

member.name: M:Calculadora.ViewModels.NormalCalcViewModel.ParseDisplay(System.Double@)
member.summary: Attempts to parse the current display string as a .

member.name: M:Calculadora.ViewModels.NormalCalcViewModel.FormatNumber(System.Double)
member.summary: Formats a for display, omitting the decimal point for whole numbers within the safe integer range.

member.name: M:Calculadora.ViewModels.NormalCalcViewModel.GetOperatorSymbol(System.String)
member.summary: Maps an internal operator token to its Unicode display symbol.

member.name: T:Calculadora.ViewModels.GraphCalcViewModel
member.summary: ViewModel for the graphing calculator view. Manages the collection of entries and provides plot data evaluated via mXparser, notifying the view when a redraw is needed.

member.name: M:Calculadora.ViewModels.GraphCalcViewModel.#cctor
member.summary: Confirms non-commercial use of the mXparser library at class load time.

member.name: F:Calculadora.ViewModels.GraphCalcViewModel.ColorPalette
member.summary: Sequential colour palette assigned to new expressions in round-robin order.

member.name: P:Calculadora.ViewModels.GraphCalcViewModel.Expressions
member.summary: Observable collection of expressions bound to the left-panel list.

member.name: P:Calculadora.ViewModels.GraphCalcViewModel.AddExpressionCommand
member.summary: Adds a new empty expression entry to .

member.name: P:Calculadora.ViewModels.GraphCalcViewModel.RemoveExpressionCommand
member.summary: Removes a specific from .

member.name: E:Calculadora.ViewModels.GraphCalcViewModel.PlotRefreshRequested
member.summary: Raised whenever the plot must be redrawn (expression text changed, visibility toggled, or collection modified).

member.name: M:Calculadora.ViewModels.GraphCalcViewModel.#ctor
member.summary: Initialises commands, subscribes to collection change events, and populates one empty expression on startup.

member.name: M:Calculadora.ViewModels.GraphCalcViewModel.AddExpression
member.summary: Creates a new with the next palette colour, subscribes to its property changes, and appends it to .

member.name: M:Calculadora.ViewModels.GraphCalcViewModel.RemoveExpression(Calculadora.Models.ExpressionItem)
member.summary: Unsubscribes from property change events and removes from .
member.param: Item to remove; no-op when null.

member.name: M:Calculadora.ViewModels.GraphCalcViewModel.RequestPlotRefresh
member.summary: Fires .

member.name: M:Calculadora.ViewModels.GraphCalcViewModel.GetPlotData(Calculadora.Models.ExpressionItem,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Evaluates 's expression with mXparser over the given axis bounds and returns coordinate arrays ready for ScottPlot.
member.remarks:
Supports three expression forms:
Standard function of X: y = f(x) or plain f(x).
Function of Y: x = f(y).
Vertical constant line: x = C.
member.param: Left bound of the visible x-axis range.
Right bound of the visible x-axis range.
Bottom bound of the visible y-axis range.
Top bound of the visible y-axis range.
member.returns: A tuple of parallel x and y arrays (500 points each), or null if the expression is empty, has invalid syntax, or throws during evaluation.

member.name: T:Calculadora.ViewModels.MainViewModel
member.summary: Root ViewModel that owns the active view and exposes navigation commands. WPF resolves the correct DataTemplate for automatically via the type-keyed templates registered in App.xaml.

member.name: P:Calculadora.ViewModels.MainViewModel.CurrentView
member.summary: The currently displayed ViewModel, bound to the ContentControl in MainWindow.xaml.

member.name: F:Calculadora.ViewModels.MainViewModel._normalCalcVm
member.summary: Retained as singletons so that calculation state is preserved across view switches.

member.name: P:Calculadora.ViewModels.MainViewModel.ShowNormalCalculatorCommand
member.summary: Switches to the standard calculator.

member.name: P:Calculadora.ViewModels.MainViewModel.ShowGraphCalculatorCommand
member.summary: Switches to the graphing calculator.

member.name: M:Calculadora.ViewModels.MainViewModel.#ctor
member.summary: Wires navigation commands and sets the default startup view to the standard calculator.

member.name: T:Calculadora.Views.GraphCalcView
member.summary: Code-behind for the graphing calculator view. Manages ScottPlot initialisation, theme synchronisation, and plot refresh cycles driven by .
GraphCalcView

member.name: M:Calculadora.Views.GraphCalcView.#ctor
member.summary: Initialises the control, subscribes to theme changes, and defers ScottPlot setup to the Loaded event so the DataContext is guaranteed available.

member.name: M:Calculadora.Views.GraphCalcView.OnThemeChanged(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Handles global theme-change notifications and refreshes the plot colours.

member.name: M:Calculadora.Views.GraphCalcView.UpdatePlotTheme
member.summary: Synchronises ScottPlot background, axis, and grid colours with the currently active light or dark theme by reading values from WPF Application resources.

member.name: M:Calculadora.Views.GraphCalcView.GetScottPlotColor(System.String,ScottPlot.Color)
member.summary: Resolves a WPF resource key to a , accepting both and resource types. Returns when the key is absent or resolution fails.
member.param: Application resource key to look up.

member.name: M:Calculadora.Views.GraphCalcView.RefreshPlot(Calculadora.ViewModels.GraphCalcViewModel)
member.summary: Clears all plot series, redraws the origin axes, evaluates every visible expression, and requests a ScottPlot refresh.
member.param: The graphing ViewModel providing expression data.

member.name: M:Calculadora.Views.GraphCalcView.InitializeComponent
member.summary: InitializeComponent

member.name: T:Calculadora.Views.NormalCalcView
member.summary: Code-behind for the standard calculator view. All interaction logic is handled by .
NormalCalcView

member.name: M:Calculadora.Views.NormalCalcView.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes the component.

member.name: M:Calculadora.Views.NormalCalcView.InitializeComponent
member.summary: InitializeComponent
